title: Journal
description: Private free-text reflection. Write as little or as much as you want — no streaks, no pressure.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: Write a few words about how today felt.

editor.createDescription: Write whatever is useful. Nothing is shared.
editor.saveError: Couldn't save your entry. Try again.

detail.title: Journal entry
detail.notFound: We couldn't find that journal entry.
detail.deleteError: Couldn't delete this entry. Try again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this entry?
confirmDelete.message: This permanently removes the entry. It can't be recovered.
